    1. HAS_KSTAT2

Class Kstat2Functions

java.lang.Object
oshi.ffm.util.platform.unix.solaris.Kstat2Functions
public final class Kstat2Functions extends Object
FFM probe for libkstat2.so.1, available on Solaris 11.4 and later but absent on illumos and earlier Solaris releases. HAS_KSTAT2 reflects whether the library was loadable at class-init time; consumers should branch to a LibKstatFunctions path on false.

Function bindings for the kstat2_* API will be added when a downstream consumer requires them. On illumos/OpenIndiana — the FFM CI target — only the legacy libkstat path is exercised, so this class is intentionally a probe-only stub today.

    static final boolean
    HAS_KSTAT2
    true if libkstat2.so.1 was loadable at JVM startup.

  • Field Details

    • HAS_KSTAT2

      public static final boolean HAS_KSTAT2
      true if libkstat2.so.1 was loadable at JVM startup. Mirrors SolarisOperatingSystemJNA.HAS_KSTAT2 on the JNA side.
